description: REQ-001 states the pipeline produces 'Result<IndexedNote, SaveError>' and acceptance criteria says 'returns { ok: true, value: IndexedNote }'. But REQ-017 states the function signature returns 'Promise<Result<NoteFileSaved, SaveError>>', matching the canonical workflows.ts CaptureAutoSave type (line 73). These two requirements contradict each other on the return type. Additionally, workflows.md line 179 uses yet another type 'Result<SavedNoteAck, SaveError>' which neither REQ matches.
